security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost https://www.google.com; font-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.pwnedpasswords.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first security vault for sensitive data management
bundle.longDescription: KESTREL Vault is a local-first security platform designed for storing and managing sensitive data with end-to-end encryption, secure file operations, and real-time security alerts. All data remains on your device with no cloud dependency.
